page_metadata.biotools__summary: Jumping Profile Hidden Markov Model (jpHMM) takes a HIV-1 or HBV genome sequence and uses a pre-calculated multiple alignment of the major HIV-1 or HBV subtypes to predict the phylogenetic breakpoints and HIV/HBV subtype of the submitted sequence.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Jumping Profile Hidden Markov Model (jpHMM) takes a HIV-1 or HBV genome sequence and uses a pre-calculated multiple alignment of the major HIV-1 or HBV subtypes to predict the phylogenetic breakpoints and HIV/HBV subtype of the submitted sequence.
